headline: Here's Why Investors Should Hold IQV Stock in Their Portfolios Now
summary: IQVIA's AI tools, record R&D backlog and strong free cash flow support its outlook, but weak liquidity and no dividend remain investor concerns.

headline: IQVIA Holdings' Q2 2026 Earnings: What to Expect
summary: IQVIA Holdings is set to announce its second-quarter earnings soon, and Wall Street expects a single-digit rise in its profits.
